title: Glowing Blocks
description: Adds 16 glowing, texture-less blocks that you can use for builds!
body:
# Glowing Blocks

Adds 16 glowing, texture-less blocks that you can use for builds!

A white glowing block can be crafted with 2 glowstone dust and 2 prismarine crystals like this, as shown in this image:

![A 2x2 crafting grid with 2 glowstone dust and 2 prismarine crystals, resulting in a white glowing block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c32702dccadf6557cd0beb17cb522f001bb36ada.png)

Colored glowing blocks can be crafted with one vanilla dye and eight glowing blocks of any color, as shown in this image:

![A 3x3 crafting grid with a purple dye surrounded by white glowing blocks, resulting in eight purple glowing blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae8b945c5c57f33b5930280508efef57a88286f7.png)

These blocks can be used to decorate your base and work really well in futuristic or space themed buildings!
